footer.class: bg-surface border-t border-border py-12 px-0 mt-10

div.class: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-10 mb-10 max-w-theme mx-auto px-5 md:px-8 lg:px-12 w-full

div.p: Your ultimate destination for checking high-quality manga updates. Read chapter updates daily and track your bookmarks seamlessly.

h4.class: text-xs capitalize tracking-[0.5px] mb-5 text-text font-semibold
text-xs capitalize tracking-[0.5px] mb-5 text-text font-semibold

a.class: w-[38px] h-[38px] rounded-theme bg-card border border-border flex items-center justify-center text-text-soft hover:bg-primary hover:text-bg hover:border-primary hover:-translate-y-[3px] transition-fast

w-[38px] h-[38px] rounded-theme bg-card border border-border flex items-center justify-center text-text-soft hover:bg-primary hover:text-bg hover:border-primary hover:-translate-y-[3px] transition-fast

div.class: border-t border-border pt-5 text-center text-xs text-muted max-w-theme mx-auto px-5 md:px-8 lg:px-12 w-full
div.p: © 2026 MangaPro. Designed for Manga Lovers. Powered by Blogger.
